items.title: [Skolnick] I’ll just say this. I think there’s a lot of guys who will slip to the minimum. I think one guy for instance, I think you can just gurantee Khris Middleton is going to be here…. He is exactly the type of player the Heat add towards the end of their career
items.author: AncientOneAurelius
items.body_excerpt: [Skolnick] “I’ll just say this. I think there’s a lot of guys who will slip to the minimum. I think one guy for instance, I think you can just gurantee Khris Middleton is going to be here…. He is exactly the type of player the Heat add towards the end of their career” Source
